text:
SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: CO = Coordination Only 
 FIDE = Fully Integrated 
 HIDE = Highly Integrated 
Null/missing (not a D-SNP plan) 

COMMENT: This variable is new in 2023. 

The Bipartisan Budget Act (BBA) of 2018 permanently authorized Medicare Advantage Dual Eligible 
Special Needs plans (D-SNPs), strengthened Medicare-Medicaid integration requirements. All D-SNPs 
must have executed contracts with state Medicaid agencies, referred to as the State Medicaid Agency 
Contract
